title: Apply environmentally sustainable work practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply environmentally sustainable work practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify current resource usage and practices

pcs.text: Identify current environmental regulations and associated procedures applicable to the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify current environmental regulations and associated procedures applicable to the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify current environmental regulations and associated procedures applicable to the workplace.

pcs.text: Identify environmental sustainability policy and procedures and environmental targets applicable to the workplace

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental sustainability policy and procedures and environmental targets applicable to the workplace.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify examples of resource usage in the workplace using records, relevant information and data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access information on impact of resource usage on environmental sustainability.
